mapper.select: SELECT book_info.id, book_info.title, book_info.author_id, book_info.cover, book_info.description, book_info.hot_count, book_info.is_finished, book_info.word_count, user.username as author_name FROM book_info left join user on book_info.author_id = user.id WHERE book_info.id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM book_info WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM book_info WHERE id IN
#{id}

DELETE FROM book_info_book_type WHERE book_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE book_info SET word_count = word_count + #{addCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{bookId}
